metadata.description: Evidence-first coding agents for GitHub Copilot CLI — adversarial multi-model review, SQL-tracked verification, and automatic rollback

plugins.name: anvil-core
plugins.description: Shared Anvil tools and commands — verification ledger, evidence bundles, git hygiene, and guardrails. Install this first.

plugins.name: anvil-code
plugins.description: Evidence-first general-purpose coding agent. Adversarial multi-model review, SQL-tracked verification, and automatic git hygiene for any programming language.

plugins.name: anvil-bicep
plugins.description: Evidence-first Azure Bicep infrastructure agent. AVM module expertise, Bicep linting, PSRule WAF compliance, and ARM deployment validation.

plugins.name: anvil-arc-ops
plugins.description: Evidence-first Azure Arc operations agent. Safety gates, SQL-tracked verification, and mandatory confirmation for destructive operations on Arc-enabled servers.

plugins.name: anvil-aks-ops
plugins.description: Evidence-first AKS operations agent. Safety gates, SQL-tracked verification, and mandatory confirmation for destructive Kubernetes cluster operations.

plugins.name: anvil-architect
plugins.description: Evidence-first Azure architecture agent. Designs cloud solutions with WAF compliance, cost estimation, and adversarial architecture review.
